epic_goal: Canonical root epic for delivering VIDA 1.0 through bounded implementation waves from Binary Foundation to Primary Switchover.
task_title: Framework execution efficiency and autonomous follow-through hardening
task_context: Harden VIDA framework execution efficiency and autonomous follow-through, including approval-loop behavior, reporting continuity, mandatory catch-review coverage, protocol self-diagnosis, and other runtime protocol-drift corrections needed for long-running autonomous development.
